// Generated by bpmn-to-code
package de.emaarco.example.types;

import java.lang.Override;
import java.lang.String;

/**
 * Name of a process variable declared by a BPMN element.
 *
 * Direction is encoded in the subtype so consumer APIs can enforce it at compile time
 * (for example, a method accepting {@code VariableName.Output} rejects inputs).
 * {@code toString()} returns the underlying string, so {@code .value()} is optional in string contexts.
 */
public sealed interface VariableName {
  String value();

  /**
   * A variable read by the declaring element (BPMN input mapping).
   */
  record Input(String value) implements VariableName {
    @Override
    public String toString() {
      return value;
    }
  }

  /**
   * A variable written by the declaring element (BPMN output mapping).
   */
  record Output(String value) implements VariableName {
    @Override
    public String toString() {
      return value;
    }
  }

  /**
   * A variable read AND written by the declaring element.
   */
  record InOut(String value) implements VariableName {
    @Override
    public String toString() {
      return value;
    }
  }
}
